articles.title: Spyro Returns on PS5 in A Realm Beyond
articles.description: Spyro the Dragon is back with a new game, 'A Realm Beyond,' launching on PS5 in Spring 2027. The announcement trailer is now available.
articles.impact: Spyro's return revitalizes interest in classic franchises.

articles.title: The Big Bad Wolf Among Us 2 Interview
articles.description: Telltale CEO discusses the long-awaited sequel, 'The Wolf Among Us 2,' and its development challenges. The game is set for a 2027 release.
articles.impact: Fans eagerly await the return of Bigby Wolf.

articles.title: ‘Star Trek’ Goes To the Scary Frontier
articles.description: Bloober Team is developing 'Star Trek: Shadow Frontier,' a horror-themed video game set in the Star Trek universe. Expect psychological thrills.
articles.impact: This game expands Star Trek's genre boundaries.

articles.title: Minecraft Dungeons II Gameplay Reveal
articles.description: Minecraft Dungeons II is set to release on September 28, 2026, with an exciting new gameplay trailer now available. Prepare for new adventures!
articles.impact: Fans are excited for the next Minecraft adventure.

articles.title: Why Did Apple Stop Using Titanium For iPhones?
articles.description: Apple has dropped titanium for the iPhone 17 Pro, despite its previous popularity. The decision is based on practical considerations.
articles.impact: Apple's material choices impact product marketing.

articles.title: How to Watch Apple’s WWDC 2026 Keynote
articles.description: Apple's WWDC 2026 is approaching, featuring updates on iOS 27 and potential new hardware. Here's how to tune in.
articles.impact: WWDC sets the stage for Apple's software future.

articles.title: Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra Review
articles.description: The Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra impresses with its consistent excellence and innovative features, solidifying its place in the Android market.
articles.impact: Samsung continues to lead in smartphone innovation.

articles.title: The 12-Month Mac: MacBook Neo's New Lifecycle
articles.description: Apple's MacBook Neo aligns with the iPhone lifecycle, raising questions about demand and resource allocation for new models.
articles.impact: Apple's strategy may reshape laptop sales.

articles.title: Microsoft Lets You Kill Bing in Windows 11 Search
articles.description: Microsoft is testing a feature to disable Bing in Windows 11 Search, allowing users to remove unwanted web results.
articles.impact: Users gain more control over search functionality.

articles.title: Control Resonant Developer Remedy's September Release Plan
articles.description: Remedy plans a major marketing campaign for 'Control Resonant' to navigate a crowded September release window.
articles.impact: Remedy's strategy is crucial for success.
